user.title: Auckland Council Collection Schedule
user.description:
Configure Auckland Council rubbish collection information.

Visit the [Auckland Council collection days page]({url}) and search for your address. The Assessment Number shown in the results is your Property ID.

error.invalid_property_id: Property ID (Assessment Number) must be a number between 5 and 15 digits
error.invalid_time_format: Time must be in HH:MM format (e.g., 07:00)

init.title: Auckland Council Options
init.description: Adjust settings for your Auckland Council integration.

error.invalid_time_format: Time must be in HH:MM format (e.g., 07:00)
